source_formulae: P0R02042: The Master Diagram: A Mandala of Consciousness

P0R02043: To navigate this complex architecture, a visual map is indispensable. Throughout this book, we will refer to the SCPN Master Diagram, a conceptual "mandala" that illustrates the 15 layers and their primary feedback pathways. The layers are arranged hierarchically, from the most fundamental quantum potentiality at the base to the ultimate source field at the apex.
P0R02044: The definitive 15 layers of the SCPN are summarised below. Each will be explored in detail in the subsequent chapters of this book.
P0R02045: [IMAGE:Ein Bild, das Kreis, Diagramm, Reihe, Kunst enthlt. KI-generierte Inhalte knnen fehlerhaft sein.]
P0R02046: [IMAGE:Ein Bild, das Text, Screenshot, Farbigkeit, parallel enthlt. KI-generierte Inhalte knnen fehlerhaft sein.]
P0R02047: The following sections detail the purpose, components, and mathematical formalism,
P0R02048: and inter-layer linkages for each of the 15 layers.
